title: oenothera avita subsp. avita
intro: Oenothera avita subsp. avita, also known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It is a perennial herb that contains high amounts of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of evening primrose include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of eczema, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions. Evening primrose is commonly prepared as a supplement in capsule or oil form, and can also be used in herbal teas and topical creams to support skin and joint health.
